name: Ben's Loan Inc
description_short: Ben's Loan Inc. is a certified pawnbroker in Renton, WA offering collateral loans, firearms sales/transfers, and precious metals/jewelry services with 50+ years of operation.
description_long:
Ben's Loan Inc. has operated as a family-owned pawn shop in downtown Renton, Washington since the 1960s, establishing itself as a long-standing fixture in the Greater Seattle area. The business is a certified pawnbroker with a federal firearms license (FFL), positioning itself as both a traditional pawn shop and a specialized firearms dealer. They are members of the Washington State Pawnbroker's Association, National Pawnbrokers Association, and serve on the NPA Board of Directors, indicating professional standing within the industry.

The company offers collateral-based loans (pawns) on items of value including jewelry, firearms, gold, silver, and other merchandise. They also buy, sell, and consign firearms—stocking major brands like Smith & Wesson, Ruger, Glock, Springfield Armory, and Sig Sauer. Beyond lending, Ben's provides jewelry services including authentication, appraisals, custom fabrication, repairs, and consignment sales. They offer an interest-free 5-month layaway program (20% down, 20% monthly payments), precious metals buying, and ancillary services like firearm transfers, scope mounting, and special orders.

Ben's distinguishes itself through its half-century tenure, professional certifications, and diverse service offerings under one roof. The company emphasizes knowledgeable staff, competitive pricing on firearms inventory, and willingness to special-order items. They position themselves as "family friendly," and maintain both in-person retail and online presence. Their firearm transfer service ($40 plus Washington State Police fees) suggests a compliance-focused operation.

However, as a pawn shop, Ben's operates in a lending category that carries inherent trade-offs. Interest rates and terms for collateral loans are not disclosed on the website, making it impossible to assess competitiveness. The business model depends on seizing and reselling collateral if loans default, which is a high-cost borrowing option compared to traditional personal loans or credit alternatives. While their certifications indicate legitimacy, pawn loans still represent expensive short-term financing for customers in urgent need of cash.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Certified pawnbroker with federal firearms license and membership in state/national pawnbroker associations
50+ years of operation in the same community (Renton, WA), indicating stability and trust
Diverse collateral acceptance including jewelry, firearms, precious metals, tools, and musical equipment
Interest-free 5-month layaway program with transparent payment structure (20% down, 20% monthly)
Full-service jewelry department including authentication, custom fabrication, repairs, and appraisals
Extensive firearms inventory with special order capability and FFL transfer services at stated fees
Extended business hours (opens 10am weekdays, 11am Sundays; closes 5-6pm) with weekend availability
cons: No interest rates, loan terms, or LTV ratios disclosed on website—impossible to compare loan competitiveness
Pawn loans are inherently high-cost short-term financing compared to personal loans or credit alternatives
Collateral-based model means default results in loss of personal property, creating financial and emotional risk
Limited online transaction capability; primarily brick-and-mortar operation requiring in-person visits
Firearms focus and ammunition sales may not align with all customer demographics or values
best_for: Customers with valuable collateral (jewelry, firearms, instruments) needing short-term emergency cash
Firearm buyers/sellers and licensed transfer customers in the Greater Seattle area
Those seeking jewelry authentication, appraisal, or custom repair services
Customers preferring interest-free layaway programs with transparent payment schedules over credit
diagnosis: Ben's Loan is best for customers with valuable collateral who need quick emergency cash or those seeking specialized firearms and jewelry services in the Seattle area. The main caveat is that pawn loans are inherently expensive short-term financing—suitable only for urgent cash needs where collateral surrender is acceptable, not as a primary lending solution for debt management or consolidation.
services: Collateral loans (pawns) on jewelry, firearms, precious metals, and other items of value
Firearms sales (new and used), special orders, and FFL person-to-person transfers
Gold and silver buying and precious metals services
Jewelry authentication, appraisals (personal and insurance), repairs, sizing, and custom fabrication
Consignment sales for firearms, jewelry, and other merchandise (80% payout to seller)
Firearm scope mounting and sight installation
Ammunition, targets, eye/ear protection, gun safes, cases, and accessories sales
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
